name: test_login_error_schema_wrong_password
description:
POST /login with wrong password — error body must match LOGIN_ERROR_SCHEMA.

        KNOWN ISSUE: ReqRes demo API no longer returns 400 for known registered
        emails with wrong passwords. It returns 200 + token with
        _meta.context='legacy_success'. Marked xfail to document the regression.
descriptionHtml:
POST /login with wrong password — error body must match LOGIN_ERROR_SCHEMA.

    KNOWN ISSUE: ReqRes demo API no longer returns 400 for known registered
    emails with wrong passwords. It returns 200 + token with
    _meta.context='legacy_success'. Marked xfail to document the regression.
statusMessage:
XFAIL ReqRes demo API returns 200+token for known emails with wrong password (_meta.context='legacy_success'). Expected 400 + error schema. Known read-only demo limitation — not a real auth success. Track: https://reqres.in — update if API behaviour is restored.

AssertionError: Expected 400 for wrong password, got 429. Body: {"error":"rate_limit_exceeded","message":"You've hit the free-tier limit of 250 requests/day.","upgrade":{"message":"Lite ($5/mo): 10,000 requests/day with commercial use license. Building a backend? See Dev ($12/mo).","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api&highlight=lite","pricing_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&highlight=lite"},"current_usage":{"requests_today":250,"daily_limit":250,"resets_at":"2026-05-12T00:00:00.000Z"},"limit":250,"remaining":0,"reset_at":1778544000,"resets_in":"13h 47m","reset_explanation":"Limits reset daily at midnight UTC","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api","recommended_plan":"dev","why_this_happened":"Free tier includes 250 requests/day. Upgrade for higher limits, persistent collections, auth, and logs.","tier":"free","_meta":{"powered_by":"ReqRes","docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","variant":"v1_b","message":"Too many requests. Back off, or use Projects for higher limits.","cta":{"label":"Get started","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade"},"context":"rate_limited"}}
assert 429 == 400
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
statusTrace:
tests/test_schema_validation.py:233: in test_login_error_schema_wrong_password
    assert response.status_code == 400, (
E   AssertionError: Expected 400 for wrong password, got 429. Body: {"error":"rate_limit_exceeded","message":"You've hit the free-tier limit of 250 requests/day.","upgrade":{"message":"Lite ($5/mo): 10,000 requests/day with commercial use license. Building a backend? Upgrade for higher limits, persistent collections, auth, and logs.","tier":"free","_meta":{"powered_by":"ReqRes","docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","variant":"v1_b","message":"Too many requests. testStage.description:
POST /login with wrong password — error body must match LOGIN_ERROR_SCHEMA.

        KNOWN ISSUE: ReqRes demo API no longer returns 400 for known registered
        emails with wrong passwords. It returns 200 + token with
        _meta.context='legacy_success'. Marked xfail to document the regression.
